title: Standoff With Iran Raises Fresh Doubts About Trump’s Freestyle Diplomacy
summary_full: A jumble of emissaries — a friend, a family member, a dove and a hawk — on the Iran crisis reflects President Trump’s improvisational approach.
summary_public: A jumble of emissaries — a friend, a family member, a dove and a hawk — on the Iran crisis reflects President Trump’s improvisational approach.
